posts.text:
I joined @Liz_Wheeler to debunk the biggest lies spun by the left and weak Republicans regarding my bill, the SAVE America Act 🇺🇸

Video

Texas should move to overturn the Plyler v. Doe decision that mandates taxpayers fund education for those here illegally.

We must end every incentive, magnet, and program that undermines our sovereignty and the rule of law.

Video

Jack Smith and his feds targeted my phone records. Why? 

They came after me because I’ve been fighting for President Trump and you.

Texas needs a proven fighter as Attorney General.

foxnews.com/politics/new-nam… #FoxNews

Thank you to We The People - Liberty In Action for your endorsement for Texas Attorney General. 

I’ve been proud to work alongside the Texas grassroots my entire career and will champion limited government in any elected office I hold #LiveFree

Non-meat campaign? Unelectable.

Imagine driving across Texas and not stopping at Lowake Steakhouse (beef tallow fries too).




Bobby LaValley (@Bobby_LaVallley)

In 2022, James Talarico said it’s “existential” to reduce meat consumption to fight climate change.

"I am proud to say that our campaign has officially become a non-meat campaign... We are only buying vegan products from our local vegan businesses."

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/Bobby_LaVallley/status/2034003528516051016#m

The only people who have anything to worry about when the SAVE Act passes are fraudsters and noncitizens. 

And that’s exactly why you hear so much leftist noise against it.

The threats facing Texas are too serious to elect an Attorney General like David Mayes Middleton II with ZERO legal experience. 

I know how to build the team, win in court, and understand the asymmetrical warfare we must engage in to win and save Texas and the West.

Video

First big clue it’s the right thing to do.


Marc E. Elias (@marceelias)

As soon as you sign this bill, Florida will be sued.



— https://nitter.net/marceelias/status/2033916025155309895#m

“As a former Texas Ranger Captain, I know what it means to have someone’s back in the fight. Chip Roy has always stood shoulder to shoulder with law enforcement - backing us when it mattered most. He has the backbone, integrity, and fight we need in our next Attorney General. I’m proud to endorse Chip Roy because I know he will never back down from defending Texas and standing with those who protect it.” - Clete Buckaloo, Ret. Texas Ranger Captain

Soros DAs must be removed. 

The case vs Officer Bretches should be dismissed


Doug OConnell (@DouglasOConnell)

BOMBSHELL MOTION FILED – AUSTIN DA JOSE GARZA CAUGHT IN 3-YEAR COVER-UP
Travis County DA’s office secretly planned to INDICT THE CITY OF AUSTIN for APD’s actions during the 2020 riots…then hid the entire scheme when they botched the statute of limitations.  
Instead of disclosing this explosive exculpatory evidence to indicted Officer Chance Bretches (and the public), they buried it

Because - while a good step to get on the bill - there is no intent to force a talking filibuster.  The strategy appears to be to burn some time, amp up message, and pray Dems opt to cut a deal.  It’s better than nothing but it’s not the full play… (as you know)


James Wallner (@jameswallner)

Both sides are demonstrating that they don’t know how to make a talking filibuster work. Democrats granted consent to waive the reading of multiple amendments right at the outset of the debate. And Republ
